channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How D-Day Helped Secure Religious Liberty
item.description: The heroic actions of June 6, 1944, protected a freedom that makes all other freedoms possible.

item.title: Why So Many Jews Are Democrats
item.description: In an excerpt from her new book, Batya Ungar-Sargon examines the puzzling trend of Jewish liberalism.

item.title: A Moral Defense of Jeff Bezos's Wealth
item.description: Entrepreneurs' use of public goods does not diminish the value they create.

item.title: Trump Promises Relief for Struggling Farmers at Wisconsin Event
item.description: CHIPPEWA FALLS, Wisc. -- President Trump told Wisconsin farmers his administration has delivered tax relief and record export growth, while he pr...
